metadata.name: Discover 3 — Geological Appraiser ETB exiles land then casts qualifying card
metadata.description: Tests the full Discover 3 flow (CR 701.57a) triggered by Geological Appraiser's ETB ability. P1 casts Geological Appraiser ({2}{R}{R}, 3/2). Both players pass priority; the creature resolves and enters the battlefield. During that resolution, its WhenEntersBattlefield ETB ability fires inline (via fire_when_enters_triggered_effects) and executes Effect::Discover{n:3}: Forest (a land) is exiled and sent to library bottom (DiscoverExiled); Night's Whisper (nonland sorcery, MV 2 <= 3) is exiled and cast for free onto the stack (DiscoverCast). Both players pass again; Night's Whisper resolves, p1 draws 2 cards and loses 2 life (40 -> 38). Two library cards (Island, Mountain) are pre-placed so the draw can succeed.
metadata.generation_notes: Geological Appraiser card definition (crates/engine/src/cards/defs/geological_appraiser.rs): mana_cost {2}{R}{R}, power 3, toughness 2; AbilityDefinition::Triggered with WhenEntersBattlefield and Effect::Discover { player: Controller, n: 3 }. Critical engine behavior: WhenEntersBattlefield triggers with Effect::Discover are executed INLINE during creature resolution via fire_when_enters_triggered_effects (replacement.rs line 966: execute_effect called directly). This is NOT a separate stack trigger — the Discover happens during the same resolution pass as the creature entering. As a result, ONE priority_round resolves the creature AND executes Discover, placing Night's Whisper on the stack. Library layout top-to-bottom: Forest (index 0 = top), Night's Whisper (index 1), Island (index 2), Mountain (index 3 = bottom). After Discover: Forest goes to library bottom (DiscoverExiled), Night's Whisper cast for free (DiscoverCast) — library has 3 cards (Island, Mountain, Forest at bottom). Night's Whisper oracle text: 'You draw 2 cards and you lose 2 life.' Night's Whisper chosen because it has no targets (unlike Lightning Bolt which requires a target that the discover free-cast cannot auto-supply). Mana pre-loaded: 2 colorless + 2 red for {2}{R}{R}.

script.step_note: p1 casts Geological Appraiser; when it resolves, its ETB fires Discover 3 inline, exiling Forest (skipped), then casting Night's Whisper for free; Night's Whisper then resolves drawing 2 and costing 2 life

actions.description: Initial: Geological Appraiser in p1 hand, library has 4 cards (Forest on top), stack empty, p1 at 40 life
actions.note: Library top-to-bottom: Forest (land, exiled and sent to bottom by Discover), Night's Whisper (MV 2 <= 3, qualifies), Island, Mountain.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Geological Appraiser paying {2}{R}{R}. Card moves from hand to the stack.

actions.description: After casting: Geological Appraiser on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: Geological Appraiser spell is on the stack awaiting priority passes.

CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Geological Appraiser resolves. During resolution, its WhenEntersBattlefield ETB fires inline via fire_when_enters_triggered_effects, executing Discover 3: Forest exiled and sent to library bottom (DiscoverExiled), Night's Whisper exiled and cast for free onto the stack (DiscoverCast). CR 701.57a.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Geological Appraiser resolves and enters the battlefield as a 3/2 creature.

CR 701.57a: Discover 3 executes inline during creature resolution. Exile from library top: (1) Forest — land, sent to library bottom (DiscoverExiled event); (2) Night's Whisper — nonland, MV 2 <= 3, qualifies. Night's Whisper cast for free onto the stack (DiscoverCast event). Deterministic engine always casts (no player choice until M10).

actions.note: CR 701.57a: WhenEntersBattlefield triggers with Effect::Discover execute inline (not as a separate stack object). Geological Appraiser enters, Discover 3 fires, Night's Whisper is on the stack.

actions.description: After Geological Appraiser resolves with inline Discover 3: it is on battlefield, Night's Whisper is on stack (cast for free), library has 3 cards (Forest at bottom), hand empty
actions.note: CR 701.57a: Night's Whisper (MV 2) was cast for free by Discover 3 and is on the stack. Forest was sent to library bottom — library has 3 cards (Island, Mountain, Forest). Stack has exactly 1 object.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Night's Whisper resolves from the stack.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Night's Whisper resolves. p1 draws 2 cards (Island and Mountain from library top).
CR 118.2: p1 loses 2 life. Life total: 40 -> 38.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Night's Whisper (cast for free by Discover 3) resolves. p1 draws 2 and loses 2 life. Card moves to p1's graveyard.

actions.description: Final: p1 at 38 life with 2 cards in hand, Geological Appraiser on battlefield, Night's Whisper in graveyard, Forest in library, stack empty
actions.note: CR 701.57a + 118.2: Full Discover 3 flow complete. Geological Appraiser is on the battlefield. Night's Whisper (discovered, cast for free) drew 2 cards and lost 2 life. Library has 1 card (Forest at bottom). Hand has 2 cards (Island and Mountain drawn by Night's Whisper). Stack is empty.
